briefdescription.para: < Prototype declarations for xilskey eps zynqmp API's

detaileddescription.para: This function performs pre checks for programming all the specified bits.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the XilSKey_ZynqMpEPs.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS - if all the conditions for programming is satisfied Errorcode - if any of the conditions are not met

memberdef.argsstring: (const u8 *Data, u8 RowStart, u8 RowEnd, XskEfusePs_Type EfuseType)
memberdef.name: XilSKey_ZynqMp_EfusePs_WriteAndVerify_RowRange

briefdescription.para: This function programs and verifys the Row range provided with provided data array in bits.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to an array which contains data to be programmed.
holds the row number from which data programming has to be started.
holds the row number till which data programming has to be performed.
holds the type of the efuse in which programming rows resides in.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS - On success XST_FAILURE - on Failure

memberdef.argsstring: (const u32 *Data, u8 RowStart, u8 RowEnd, XskEfusePs_Type EfuseType)
memberdef.name: XilSKey_ZynqMp_EfusePs_WriteAndVerify_RowData

briefdescription.para: This function programs and verifys the Row range provided with provided data array in bytes.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to an array which contains data to be programmed.
holds the row number from which data programming has to be started.
holds the row number till which data programming has to be performed.
holds the type of the efuse in which programming rows resides in.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS - On success XST_FAILURE - on Failure

briefdescription.para: This function programs a particular bit.

parameterdescription.para: specifies the row number to program.
specifies the column number to program.
specifies the eFUSE type.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS - On success ErrorCode - on Failure

briefdescription.para: This function programs secure control bits specified by user.

parameterdescription.para: is an instance of efuseps of Zynq MP.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS - On success ErrorCode - on Failure

briefdescription.para: This function programs secure control bits of eFUSE.

parameterdescription.para: is an instance of efuseps of ZynqMp.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS - On success ErrorCode - on Failure

briefdescription.para: This function is used to read the PS eFUSE secure control bits from cache or from eFUSE array based on user selection.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the XilSKey_SecCtrlBits which holds the read secure control bits.

simplesect.para: It is highly recommended to read from eFuse cache. Because reading from efuse may reduce the life of the efuse. And Cache reload is required for obtaining updated values for ReadOption 0.

briefdescription.para: This function is used verify eFUSE keys for Zeros before programming.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to eFUSE ps instance.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if keys are not programmed
ErrorCode if keys are already programmed.

briefdescription.para: This function throws an error if user requests already programmed User FUSE bit to revert, and copies the User FUSE bits which needs actually to be programmed into provided UserFuses_TobePrgrmd pointer.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to eFUSE ps instance.
holds User FUSE bits which needs to be actually programmed.

listitem.para: ErrorCode if user requests programmed bit to revert.
XST_SUCCESS if user requests valid bits

simplesect.para: If user requests a non-zero bit for making to zero throws an error which is not possible

briefdescription.para: This function throws an error if user requests already programmed User FUSE bit to revert, and copies the bits to be programmed in particular row into provided UserFuses_TobePrgrmd pointer.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to user requested programming bits of an User FUSE row.
is a pointer to already programmed bits of User FUSE row on eFUSE.
holds User FUSE row bits which needs to be programmed actually.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE: Returns error if user requests programmed bit to revert
XST_SUCCESS: If User requests valid bits.

simplesect.para: If user requests a non-zero bit for making to zero throws an error which is not possible

briefdescription.para: This function programs RSA enable secure control bits of eFUSE.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer which holds 32 bits of secure control register.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS - On success ErrorCode - on Failure
For ZynqMP silicon version 1.0 and 2.0 RSA authentication is enabled only by programming 24 and 25 bits of SEC_CTRL register but from silicon V3.0 bits 11:25 should be programmed

briefdescription.para: This function provides support to read eFUSE memory.

parameterdescription.para: Higher 32-bit address of the XilSKey_Efuse structure.
Lower 32-bit address of the XilSKey_Efuse structure.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS - On success ErrorCode - on Failure

briefdescription.para: This function provides support to program eFUSE memory.

parameterdescription.para: Higher 32-bit address of the XilSKey_Efuse structure.
Lower 32-bit address of the XilSKey_Efuse structure.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS - On success ErrorCode - on Failure

briefdescription.para: This function is used to program the PS eFUSE of ZynqMP, based on user inputs.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XilSKey_ZynqMpEPs.

simplesect.para: After eFUSE programming is complete, the cache is automatically reloaded so all programmed eFUSE bits can be directly read from cache.

inbodydescription.para: Check the temperature and voltage(VCC_AUX and VCC_PINT_LP)

briefdescription.para: This function is used to read the PS eFUSE secure control bits from cache or eFUSE based on user input provided.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XilSKey_SecCtrlBits which holds the read secure control bits.

Indicates whether or not to read from the actual eFUSE array or from the eFUSE cache.
0(XSK_EFUSEPS_READ_FROM_CACHE) Reads from eFUSE cache
1(XSK_EFUSEPS_READ_FROM_EFUSE) Reads from eFUSE array

simplesect.para: It is highly recommended to read from eFuse cache. Because reading from efuse may reduce the life of the efuse. And Cache reload is required for obtaining updated values for ReadOption 0.

briefdescription.para: This function programs and verifies the particular bit of eFUSE array.

parameterdescription.para: specifies the row number.
specifies the column number.
specifies the eFUSE type.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS - On success ErrorCode - on Failure

briefdescription.para: This function returns particular row data directly from eFUSE array.

parameterdescription.para: specifies the row number to read.
specifies the eFUSE type.
is a pointer to 32 bit variable to hold the data read from provided data

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS - On success ErrorCode - on Failure

briefdescription.para: This function reloads the cache of eFUSE so that can be directly read from cache.

simplesect.para: Not recommended to call this API frequently, if this API is called all the cache memory is reloded by reading eFUSE array, reading eFUSE bit multiple times may diminish the life time.

briefdescription.para: This function sets all the required parameters to program eFUSE array.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS - On success ErrorCode - on Failure

briefdescription.para: This function sets timers for programming and reading from eFUSE.
This function performs the CRC check of AES key.

parameterdescription.para: A 32 bit CRC value of an expected AES key.

simplesect.para: For Calculating the CRC of the AES key use the XilSKey_CrcCalculation() function or XilSkey_CrcCalculation_AesKey() function

briefdescription.para: This function is used to read a user fuse from the eFUSE or cache.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to an array which holds the readback user fuse.
A variable which holds the user fuse number. Range is (User fuses: 0 to 7)

Indicates whether or not to read from the actual eFUSE array or from the eFUSE cache.
0(XSK_EFUSEPS_READ_FROM_CACHE) Reads from eFUSE cache
1(XSK_EFUSEPS_READ_FROM_EFUSE) Reads from eFUSE array

simplesect.para: It is highly recommended to read from eFuse cache. Because reading from efuse may reduce the life of the efuse. And Cache reload is required for obtaining updated values for ReadOption 0.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to read the PPK0 hash from an eFUSE or eFUSE cache.

parameterdescription.para: A pointer to an array which holds the readback PPK0 hash.

Indicates whether or not to read from the actual eFUSE array or from the eFUSE cache.
0(XSK_EFUSEPS_READ_FROM_CACHE) Reads from eFUSE cache
1(XSK_EFUSEPS_READ_FROM_EFUSE) Reads from eFUSE array

simplesect.para: It is highly recommended to read from eFuse cache. Because reading from efuse may reduce the life of the efuse. And Cache reload is required for obtaining updated values for ReadOption 0.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to read the PPK1 hash from eFUSE or cache.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to an array which holds the readback PPK1 hash.

Indicates whether or not to read from the actual eFUSE array or from the eFUSE cache.
0(XSK_EFUSEPS_READ_FROM_CACHE) Reads from eFUSE cache
1(XSK_EFUSEPS_READ_FROM_EFUSE) Reads from eFUSE array

simplesect.para: It is highly recommended to read from eFuse cache. Because reading from efuse may reduce the life of the efuse. And Cache reload is required for obtaining updated values for ReadOption 0.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to read SPKID from eFUSE or cache based on user's read option.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to a 32 bit variable which holds SPK ID.

Indicates whether or not to read from the actual eFUSE array or from the eFUSE cache.
0(XSK_EFUSEPS_READ_FROM_CACHE) Reads from eFUSE cache
1(XSK_EFUSEPS_READ_FROM_EFUSE) Reads from eFUSE array

simplesect.para: It is highly recommended to read from eFuse cache. Because reading from efuse may reduce the life of the efuse. And Cache reload is required for obtaining updated values for ReadOption 0.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to read DNA from eFUSE.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to an array of 3 x u32 words which holds the readback DNA.

briefdescription.para: This function is used verify eFUSE keys for Zeros.

parameterdescription.para: is row number from which verification has to be started.
is row number till which verification has to be ended.
is the type of the eFUSE in which these rows reside.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if keys are not programmed. Errorcode on failure.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes sysmonpsu driver.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS - On success ErrorCode - on Failure

briefdescription.para: This function is used by PMUFW IPI call handler for programming eFUSE.

parameterdescription.para: Higher 32-bit address of the XilSKey_Efuse structure.
Lower 32-bit address of the XilSKey_Efuse structure.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS - On success ErrorCode - on Failure

briefdescription.para: This file contains the PS eFUSE API's of ZynqMp to program/read the eFUSE array.

detaileddescription.para: Ver Who Date Changes 4.0 vns 10/01/15 First release vns 10/20/15 Modified XilSKey_ZynqMp_EfusePs_ReadSecCtrlBits API when reading from efuse memory to return both bits of secure control feature for RSA enable, PPK hash bits invalid bits. 6.0 vns 07/18/16 PR #1968, Provided User FUSEs single bit programming Removed JTAG User code programming and reading feature. Added temperature and voltage checks, while programming and reading eFUSE array. Added separate function to set timing parameters and sysmon PSU driver initialization. Added init function while from eFUSE. Added appropriate error codes on failure returns. vns 08/24/16 Fixed eFUSE ZynqMP programming by adding unlocking before eFUSE PS initialization. 6.2 vns 02/18/17 Added margin reads for verifying, added CRC check, Removed temperature checks for each bit. Added temperature checks in all read APIs. 6.4 vns 02/19/18 Added efuse cache reload call in function XilSKey_ZynqMp_EfusePs_Write(), so on successful efuse programming, programmed fuses can directly read from cache of the efuse. 6.6 vns 06/06/18 Added doxygen tags vns 09/18/18 Added APIs to support eFUSE programming from linux vns 10/11/18 Added support to re-program non-zero SPKID 6.7 arc 01/05/19 Fixed MISRA-C violations. arc 25/02/19 Added NULL checks and validations for input params and add timeouts and status info arc 03/15/19 Modified initial default status value as XST_FAILURE 6.7 psl 03/21/19 Fixed MISRA-C violation. 6.8 psl 06/07/19 Added doxygen tags psl 06/25/19 Fixed Coverity warnings. psl 06/28/19 Added doxygen tags. psl 07/05/19 Added Asserts for validation. psl 07/12/19 Corrected length of data to read for XilSKey_EfusePs_ConvertBytesBeToLe function. psl 07/23/19 Fixed input validations. vns 08/07/19 Fixed CTRL LOCK in XilSKey_ZynqMp_EfusePs_ReadSecCtrlBits psl 08/13/19 Fixed MISRA-C violation vns 08/29/19 Initialized Status variables vns 09/17/19 Removed Tbits programming from library as they are to be programmed under manufacturing list. 6.9 kpt 02/16/20 Fixed coverity warnings 02/27/20 Added Error codes in XilSKey_ZynqMp_EfusePs_WriteBit 02/27/20 Removed extra ppk hash zeroes checking in XilSKey_ZynqMp_EfusePs_Write 03/18/20 Replaced while loop with Xil_WaitForEvents in XilSKey_ZynqMp_EfusePs_WriteBit, XilSKey_ZynqMp_EfusePs_ReadRow. vns 03/18/20 Fixed Armcc compilation errors kal 03/18/20 Removed Temp and Voltage check while checking AES key CRC. kal 03/20/20 Removed Temp and Voltage checks for eFuse reads. kpt 03/17/20 Replaced direct eFuse reads with cache reads and Error code is returned when user chooses read option as eFuse. ana 04/07/20 Removed IsPpk0Sha3Hash and IsPpk1Sha3Hash variables, as these are not required with only sha3 support. kal 04/09/20 Added Temp and Voltage checks before unlocking the controller. 7.0 kal 06/04/20 Fixed XilSKey_ZynqMp_EfusePs_CheckAesKeyCrc return Status in case of success. am 10/04/20 Resolved MISRA C violations 7.1 am 11/29/20 Resolved MISRA C violations kal 03/14/21 Added eFuse classification for eFuse read/write IPI requests kpt 05/11/21 Added Baremetal support for programming PUF Fuses as general purpose data kpt 05/21/21 Added support to allow PPK Hash programming multiple times 7.2 am 07/13/21 Fixed doxygen warnings 7.7 kal 04/09/25 Update XilSKey_ZynqMp_EfusePs_Write_UsrCtrlBits to return Success in case the request is to program already programmed eFuses.
